cases.prompt: Summarize web-ux-test/results.yaml for triage and tell me which findings should become regression tests.
cases.expected_output: A severity-ordered report that separates confirmed findings from hypotheses and recommends regression candidates.
assertions: Groups findings by critical, high, medium, and low severity.

cases.prompt: Here are three web UX findings with screenshots and console errors. Create an engineering triage summary with next steps.
cases.expected_output: A concise triage report preserving evidence, reproduction details, suspected areas, and recommended next steps.
assertions: Preserves scenario IDs and evidence references.
Separates confirmed issues from follow-up questions.

cases.prompt: Run the validated plan in the browser and collect findings.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; browser execution belongs to run-playwright-mcp-web-ux-test.
assertions: Does not use this skill for browser execution.
